title: China claims the world’s fastest supercomputer
summary: China has reclaimed the world's fastest supercomputer title with LineShine, surpassing El Capitan on the TOP500 ranking despite US trade restrictions on advanced computing components. The achievement marks a significant geopolitical statement and demonstrates China's technological progress despite export controls limiting GPU access.
content:
The LineShine supercomputer at the National Supercomputing Center in Shenzhen. | Photo: Liang Xu/Xinhua via Getty Images	

Despite trade restrictions, China has reclaimed the title of the world's fastest supercomputer for the first time since 2018. LineShine has pushed El Capitan out of number one on the TOP500 ranking. That's despite strict limits on what high-powered computing components can be sold to China by US firms, which dominate the list, with America holding three of the top five spots. LineShine doesn't even use any GPUs, which are typically the backbone of modern supercomputers.
While reaching the peak of the Top500 carries obvious bragging rights, it also serves as a message from the Chinese government to the US. The Trump administration has sought …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 中国宣布拥有世界最快超级计算机
zh.summary: 中国以LineShine超级计算机重新获得世界最快超级计算机的称号，在TOP500排行榜中超越El Capitan，尽管美国对先进计算芯片施加了贸易限制。这一成就标志着一项重大的地缘政治声明，并展示了中国尽管面临美国出口管制限制GPU获取而取得的技术进步。

title: Writer Ian Bogost says ‘The Small Stuff’ can help us reclaim our lives from dematerialization
summary: Writer Ian Bogost argues that focusing on 'The Small Stuff' can help counteract the dematerialization trend in technology and restore human agency. The piece questions whether Silicon Valley has prioritized the wrong innovations in its pursuit of scale.
content: Has Silicon Valley been building the wrong things?

zh.title: 作家伊恩·博格斯特说《小事物》可以帮助我们从非物质化中重获生活
zh.summary: 作家伊恩·博格斯特主张，专注于《小事物》可以帮助抵抗科技领域的非物质化趋势，并恢复人类的主动权。这篇文章质疑硅谷是否在追求规模的过程中优先考虑了错误的创新。

title: The Cube is Jim Henson’s little-known proto-Black Mirror masterpiece
summary: Jim Henson's 1969 teleplay "The Cube," produced for NBC's experimental anthology series, stands as a mind-bending bottle film that predates modern sci-fi anthology shows. The 53-minute production showcases Henson's ability to create mature, unconventional storytelling beyond his famous puppet work.
content:
That sure is a man in a cube, alright. | Image: NBC / Jim Henson Company	

I'm sure we're all familiar with Dark Crystal, so we know that Jim Henson can be weird and tackle slightly more mature subject matter. But there is little in his oeuvre that is quite as mind-bending as the Muppetless The Cube. This 1969 teleplay was produced for an NBC anthology series called Experiment in Television, which featured, appropriately enough, various experimental films, plays, and documentaries. One episode even featured Marshall McLuhan explaining his oft-cited theory that "the medium is the message." 
Even among all these oddities, however, Jim Henson's The Cube stands out. It's a 53-minute bottle film - taking place almost e …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《立方体》是吉姆·汉森鲜为人知的黑镜式杰作
zh.summary: 吉姆·汉森1969年为美国全国广播公司的实验选集剧集创作的电视剧《立方体》是一部令人深思的独幕剧，早于现代科幻选集节目问世。这部53分钟的作品展示了汉森在其著名木偶工作之外进行成人化、非常规叙事创作的能力。

title: TechCrunch Mobility: All eyes on Tesla FSD
summary: TechCrunch Mobility's latest newsletter examines developments in autonomous transportation with focus on Tesla's Full Self-Driving system. The coverage explores how AI is reshaping the future of mobility and transportation technology.
content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

zh.title: TechCrunch Mobility: 聚焦特斯拉FSD
zh.summary: TechCrunch Mobility最新通讯深入探讨了自动驾驶交通领域的发展，重点关注特斯拉全自动驾驶系统。报道探讨了人工智能如何重塑交通运输技术的未来。

title: Why Wall Street thinks US memory maker Micron is the next Nvidia
summary: Wall Street investors view Micron, a US memory maker, as the next potential AI boom stock following Nvidia's explosive growth. The confidence reflects the semiconductor industry's critical role in meeting AI infrastructure demand.
content: Eager to find more public AI-related companies that may do as well as Nvidia, Wall Street investors think they've found a winner with Micron.

zh.title: 华尔街为何认为美国存储芯片制造商美光是下一个英伟达
zh.summary: 华尔街投资者将美国存储芯片制造商美光视为继英伟达爆炸性增长后的下一个潜在AI热潮股票。这种信心反映了半导体行业在满足AI基础设施需求中的关键作用。

title: Prosecutors used ChatGPT logs as evidence in the Palisades fire trial
summary: Prosecutors used ChatGPT conversation logs as evidence in the trial of Jonathan Rinderknecht, charged with arson for starting one of LA's deadliest wildfires. The case demonstrates how AI chatbot interactions are increasingly being used as admissible evidence in criminal proceedings.
content:
Jonathan Rinderknecht was facing arson charges for setting a fire on New Year's Day in 2025, which became one of the deadliest wildfires in LA history. To make their case, prosecutors turned to location data from his iPhone, security camera footage, and witness testimony. But they also turned to his ChatGPT logs.
Prosecutors said that Rinderknecht had ChatGPT generate images of fire, asked the chatbot, "Why am I so angry all the time?", and ranted to it about how the wealthy were destroying the world. They also pointed to a screen recording in which Rinderknecht asked ChatGPT whether someone could be blamed for a fire if it was lit by their …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 检察官在帕利萨德大火审判中使用ChatGPT日志作为证据
zh.summary: 检察官在乔纳森·林德克内克特的审判中使用ChatGPT对话日志作为证据。林德克内克特被控犯有纵火罪，因引发洛杉矶最致命的野火之一而受审。这个案件表明人工智能聊天机器人互动越来越多地被用作刑事诉讼中的可采纳证据。

title: Govee’s smart nugget ice maker makes every iced drink feel like a luxury
summary: Govee launched the GoveeLife Smart Nugget Ice Maker Pro, a $500 premium smart home device designed for consumers who prioritize high-quality nugget ice. The product targets the niche market of ice enthusiasts who value texture and beverage experience.
content: For some people, the ice in a beverage is almost as important as the drink itself. That’s the audience Govee had in mind when designing its latest ice maker, the GoveeLife Smart Nugget Ice Maker Pro. This $500 premium smart home gadget is aimed at those who crave what’s called “the good ice,” the soft, chewable […]

zh.title: Govee智能软冰制冰机让每杯冰饮都成为奢侈享受
zh.summary: Govee推出GoveeLife智能软冰制冰机Pro，这是一款售价500美元的高端智能家居设备，面向重视高品质软冰的消费者。该产品针对注重冰粒口感和饮料体验的冰爱好者细分市场。

title: Nest’s quest to fix your thermostat
summary: The article chronicles Nest's founding story and Tony Fadell's decision to return from iPhone success to reinvent the home thermostat after frustration with outdated, expensive temperature controls. It explores how Fadell's leadership and vision helped shape the early days of a company that would become instrumental in the smart home revolution. This matters because Nest's approach to thermostat design influenced how consumers think about connected home devices.
content:
The founding story of Nest is pretty much a perfect tech myth. A legendary product maker (in this case, Tony Fadell) helps create one of the most successful products ever (the iPhone) and then rides off into the sunset to enjoy the rest of his life, only to have an experience that drags him back for one last job. For Fadell, that job was to try and reinvent the thermostat. And maybe change the way our homes work forever.
On this episode of Version History, we tell the story of the early days of Nest. The Verge's David Pierce, Nilay Patel, and Jennifer Pattison Tuohy describe Fadell's frustration with outdated, expensive temperature controls …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Nest改造恒温器的探索
zh.summary: 这篇文章讲述了Nest的创始故事和Tony Fadell的决定。在iPhone成功后，Fadell决定回到家庭领域改革恒温器产业，因为他对当时过时且昂贵的温度控制系统感到失望。文章探讨了Fadell的领导力和远见如何塑造了Nest早期发展，最终使其成为智能家居革命的推动力量。这很重要，因为Nest的恒温器设计方法影响了消费者对互联家居设备的认知。

title: Ad-free streaming is a luxury now
summary: Ad-free streaming, once a core differentiator that made streaming services superior to cable television, has become a premium luxury as platforms introduce cheaper ad-supported tiers. The article traces this shift from Netflix's original $7.99/month ad-free model to today's tiered approach where avoiding ads requires paying significantly more. This reflects the streaming industry's maturation and need to maximize revenue as subscriber growth plateaus.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more news about the streaming industry, follow Emma Roth. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
Streaming was once a reprieve from cable. Not only could you watch whatever you wanted at any given time, but you didn't have to sit through five-minute-long commercial breaks. And the best part was the price: Netflix, for example, cost just $7.99 / month when it launched its standalone streaming service in 2010. Amazon's Prime Video was the same, offering ad-free streaming as a p …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 无广告流媒体已成为奢侈品
zh.summary: 无广告流媒体曾经是流媒体服务相对于有线电视的核心竞争优势，但如今已成为高端奢侈品，因为平台开始推出包含广告的低价套餐。文章追踪了这一转变的过程，从Netflix最初的每月7.99美元无广告模式发展到今天的分层定价方案，其中用户需要支付更高的价格才能避免广告。这反映了流媒体行业的成熟发展和在用户增长放缓背景下最大化收入的迫切需求。

title: TMD’s keyless bike lock is a $280 solution to a $60 problem
summary: TMD's Chain Lock is a $280 smart bike lock that combines Bluetooth proximity sensors, motion alarms, and premium materials like Dyneema and Kevlar. While smart bike locks have historically struggled to justify their cost, TMD's ART-2 insurance certification and durable construction make it a compelling option for expensive e-bike owners.
content:
A $280 bike lock on a $10,000 e-bike.	

I've seen lots of so-called "smart" bike locks over the years, but none so far could justify the added cost. A newcomer that got its start securing ATMs for banks is trying to change that. There's nothing wholly unique about the TMD Chain Lock, but the combination of materials, performance, and insurance-friendly ART-2 certification makes it worth considering.
TMD's first bicycle lock combines a Bluetooth proximity sensor and motion alarm with a slender core of hardened steel chain wrapped in a soft and lightweight sleeve of high performance Dyneema and Kevlar fibers. That makes this lock tough, yet flexible enough to conveniently wrap arou …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: TMD的无钥匙自行车锁是一个280美元的解决方案，用来解决60美元的问题
zh.summary: TMD的链式锁是一款280美元的智能自行车锁，结合了蓝牙近距离传感器、运动警报和Dyneema与Kevlar等高级材料。虽然智能自行车锁历来难以证明成本的合理性，但TMD的ART-2保险认证和耐用的构造使其成为昂贵电动自行车所有者的引人注目的选择。

title: Indian payments chief thinks AI will be heavily involved in next era of digital payment growth
summary: India's chief payments official Dilip Asbe believes artificial intelligence will play a significant role in the next phase of digital payment growth. He suggests that newer UPI applications could become more competitive by adopting viable commercial models powered by AI.
content: Dilip Asbe said that newer UPI apps could be more competitive with a viable commercial model

zh.title: 印度支付主管认为人工智能将在数字支付增长的下一个时代中起重要作用
zh.summary: 印度首席支付官员Dilip Asbe认为人工智能将在数字支付增长的下一阶段发挥重要作用。他建议，较新的UPI应用程序可以通过采用由人工智能驱动的可行商业模式来变得更具竞争力。
